text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The last day of summer camp is here.

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text: Hey, Jordan! Sit next to us on the bus?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What are you gonna do, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the bus heading back to the academy...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I take out my phone and check my messages.

text_block_list.name: Jordan (LANE)
text_block_list.text: Bored. Everyone's sleeping. Got any fun stories?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tosen Jordan and I chat for a bit over text.
